caption: A person's hand is shown in a close-up shot interacting with a woody shrub. The hand is pale and holds a small, leafy branch of the plant between the thumb and forefinger. The shrub has thin, brown stems and small, silvery-green leaves. The background is blurred, consisting of more foliage and muted earthy tones. Across the sequence of images, the hand remains in a similar position, gently holding the plant, with only subtle movements as the person examines the foliage. There are no other people, clothing, equipment, or on-screen text visible in the scene. The lighting is soft and diffused, and the overall composition focuses exclusively on the tactile interaction between the hand and the plant.
